rows.label_vi: Ngồi nghe mẹ kể từ đầu
rows.reward: Reveal how the scammer built trust through remembered family details, grief, health check-ins, and fear of bad luck.
rows.risk: If player judges too early, mother hides the relationship.

rows.reward: Expose secrecy scripts, voice notes, lucky-day deadlines, and the way ‘thầy’ provides emotional attention.
rows.risk: Pressuring for the phone costs Tình thân.

rows.label_vi: Gọi dì Tư làm đồng minh
rows.reward: Build a non-judgmental family support channel before confronting evidence.
rows.risk: If framed as scolding, mother feels surrounded.

rows.label_vi: Đưa mẹ hỏi sư thầy thật
rows.reward: Counter spiritual manipulation using a trusted spiritual register, not mockery.
rows.risk: Only works after mother has opened up.

rows.label_vi: Rủ dì Tư sang uống trà
rows.reward: Use family memory and care to replace the scammer's emotional role.
rows.risk: Too much pressure turns ally into an accusation.

rows.reward: Protect money and preserve evidence while deciding how much to tell mother.
rows.risk: Going around mother can protect assets but hurt agency.

rows.label_vi: Cùng mẹ xem lại sao kê
rows.reward: Show escalation and sunk-cost pattern: small first transfer, larger rituals, deadline-driven withdrawals.
rows.risk: Accusatory framing converts evidence into shame.
